description:
Calculate the Active Power (kW), Reactive Power (kVAR), and Apparent Power (kVA) for a single-phase AC load using the Electrical Engineering Calculations app. Use a Voltage of 230 V, Current of 14.5 A, and a Power Factor of 0.82. Save the results to /sdcard/power_analysis.txt in the following format:

Active Power: <value> kW
Reactive Power: <value> kVAR
Apparent Power: <value> kVA
